case_title: CHIK WAN JUNG VS. SONG HUI CHOI

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUNG, CHIK WAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOI, SONG HUI DOES 1 TO X THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1224 TAYLOR ST., #15, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT **ALSO AS TO ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS** FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNG, CHIK WAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, SONG HUI
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNG, CHIK WAN SERVED SEP-20-2013, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, SONG HUI

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNG, CHIK WAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, SONG HUI DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
